name: Plains Special Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 1 tablespoon butter in a 2- or 2-1/2-quart nonmetal deep baking dish and place the dish in the oven. Set the oven temperature to 400°F.
2. In a saucepan, combine cornmeal, salt, sugar, and boiling water. Cook, stirring over low heat, until thick and smooth. Remove from heat and slowly add milk, stirring. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in melted butter and baking powder and beat until the batter is well blended.
3. Remove the heated baking dish from the oven and rotate to distribute the butter evenly over the bottom and sides. Pour in the batter and bake in the preheated oven until firm, about 45 minutes.
4. Serve hot from the baking dish.
